name: Light fuel oil; combusted in industrial equipment Bridge; Building Systems to USLCI
description:
This process links an input in a Building Systems process to a provider from the USLCI repository on the Federal LCA Commons. The intended provider for this process is "Residual fuel oil, combusted in industrial boiler - RNA"
The conversion factor is taken from the heat content of Residual Oil No. 5 in 
https://www.epa.gov/system/files/documents/2022-10/Default%20Heat%20Content%20Ratios%20for%20Help%20and%20User%20Guide%20%281%29.pdf
